Bollinger breakout with ADX trend filter reduces false signals in ranging markets.

Combining MACD, Bollinger bands, Donchian channels, ATR, ADX and OBV can detect trends in the market by combining multiple momentum indicators. The stop loss at 3% below minimum historical price level and take profit at horizontal line above maximum historical price level ensures risk management.
